book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: \+w Take heed that\+w* \+w ye do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w alms\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w men\+w*, \+w to\+w* \+w be seen\+w* \+w of them\+w*: \+w otherwise\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w reward\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w thou doest\+w* \+add thine\+add* \+w alms\+w*, \+w do not\+w* \+w sound a trumpet\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w the hypocrites\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the synagogues\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the streets\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they may have glory\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w men\+w*. \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w They have\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w reward\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w doest\+w* \+w alms\+w*, \+w let\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w left hand\+w* \+w know\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w right hand\+w* \+w doeth\+w*:

\+w That\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w alms\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which seeth\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w* \+w himself\+w* \+w shall reward\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w openly\+w*.

¶ \+w And\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w thou prayest\+w*, \+w thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the hypocrites\+w* \+add are\+add*: \+w for\+w* \+w they love\+w* \+w to pray\+w* \+w standing\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the synagogues\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the corners\+w* \+w of the streets\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w may be seen\+w* \+w of men\+w*. \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w They have\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w reward\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w thou\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w thou prayest\+w*, \+w enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w closet\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w when thou hast shut\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w door\+w*, \+w pray\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which seeth\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w* \+w shall reward\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w openly\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w when ye pray\+w*, \+w use\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w vain repetitions\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w the heathen\+w* \+add do\+add*: \+w for\+w* \+w they think\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w they shall be heard\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w much speaking\+w*.

\+w Be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w ye therefore\+w* \+w like\+w* \+w unto them\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w what things\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+w need of\+w*, \+w before\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w ask\+w* \+w him\+w*.
\+w After this manner\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w pray\+w* \+w ye\+w*: \+w Our\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which art\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w Hallowed be\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w name\+w*.
\+w Thy\+w* \+w kingdom\+w* \+w come\+w*. \+w Thy\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w be done\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w earth\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+add it is\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.
\+w Give\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w this day\+w* \+w our\+w* \+w daily\+w* \+w bread\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w forgive\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w our\+w* \+w debts\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w we\+w* \+w forgive\+w* \+w our\+w* \+w debtors\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w lead\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w temptation\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w deliver\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w evil\+w*: \+w For\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the power\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the glory\+w*, \+w for\+w* \+w ever\+w*. \+w Amen\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w ye forgive\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w trespasses\+w*, \+w your\+w* \+w heavenly\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w forgive\+w* \+w you\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w ye forgive\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w trespasses\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w forgive\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w trespasses\+w*.

¶ \+w Moreover\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w ye fast\+w*, \+w be\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w the hypocrites\+w*, \+w of a sad countenance\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they disfigure\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w faces\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they may appear\+w* \+w unto men\+w* \+w to fast\+w*. \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w They have\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w reward\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w thou\+w*, \+w when thou fastest\+w*, \+w anoint\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w head\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w wash\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w face\+w*;

\+w That\+w* \+w thou appear\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w unto men\+w* \+w to fast\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w which seeth\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w secret\+w*, \+w shall reward\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w openly\+w*.

¶ \+w Lay\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w up\+w* \+w for yourselves\+w* \+w treasures\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w earth\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w moth\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w rust\+w* \+w doth corrupt\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w thieves\+w* \+w break through\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w steal\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w lay up\+w* \+w for yourselves\+w* \+w treasures\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w moth\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w rust\+w* \+w doth corrupt\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w thieves\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w break through\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w steal\+w*:
\+w For\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w treasure\+w* \+w is\+w*, \+w there\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heart\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w The light\+w* \+w of the body\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the eye\+w*: \+w if\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w eye\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w single\+w*, \+w thy\+w* \+w whole\+w* \+w body\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w full of light\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w eye\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w evil\+w*, \+w thy\+w* \+w whole\+w* \+w body\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w full of darkness\+w*. \+w If\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w the light\+w* \+w that is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w darkness\+w*, \+w how great\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w that darkness\+w*!

¶ \+w No man\+w* \+w can\+w* \+w serve\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w masters\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w either\+w* \+w he will hate\+w* \+w the one\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w love\+w* \+w the other\+w*; \+w or else\+w* \+w he will hold to\+w* \+w the one\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w despise\+w* \+w the other\+w*. \+w Ye cannot\+w* \+w serve\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w mammon\+w*.

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Take\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thought\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w life\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall eat\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall drink\+w*; \+w nor yet\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w body\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall put on\+w*. \+w Is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w the life\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w than meat\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the body\+w* \+w than raiment\+w*?

\+w Behold\+w* \+w the fowls\+w* \+w of the air\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they sow\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w do they reap\+w*, \+w nor\+w* \+w gather\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w barns\+w*; \+w yet\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heavenly\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w feedeth\+w* \+w them\+w*. \+w Are\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w better\+w* \+w than they\+w*?
\+w Which\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w by taking thought\+w* \+w can\+w* \+w add\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w cubit\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w stature\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w why\+w* \+w take ye thought\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w raiment\+w*? \+w Consider\+w* \+w the lilies\+w* \+w of the field\+w*, \+w how\+w* \+w they grow\+w*; \+w they toil\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w do they spin\+w*:

\+w And yet\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w Solomon\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w glory\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w arrayed\+w* \+w like\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of these\+w*.

\+w Wherefore\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w clothe\+w* \+w the grass\+w* \+w of the field\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w to day\+w* \+w is\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to morrow\+w* \+w is cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the oven\+w*, \+add shall he\+add* \+w not\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w more\+w* \+add clothe\+add* \+w you\+w*, \+w O ye of little faith\+w*?

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w take\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thought\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w What\+w* \+w shall we eat\+w*? \+w or\+w*, \+w What\+w* \+w shall we drink\+w*? \+w or\+w*, \+w Wherewithal\+w* \+w shall we be clothed\+w*?

(\+w For\+w* \+w after all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w the Gentiles\+w* \+w seek\+w*:) \+w for\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heavenly\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w ye have need\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w seek ye\+w* \+w first\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w righteousness\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w shall be added\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.

\+w Take\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thought\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the morrow\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w the morrow\+w* \+w shall take thought\+w* \+w for the things\+w* \+w of itself\+w*. \+w Sufficient\+w* \+w unto the day\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w the evil\+w* \+w thereof\+w*.
